chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4997 of 2025 (Ghulam Jeelani v Province of Sindh & others) Date Order with signature of Judge(s) Before: Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Mr. Justice Zulfiqar Ali Sangi 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Main Case. Date of hearing and order:-09.03.2026 Mr. Abdul Aziz Kanhar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Barrister Asad Ali, Advocate for Respondent-KMC. ********** O R D E R Adnan-ul-Karim Memon, J. – Petitioner Ghulam Jeelani filed this Constitution Petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of Pakistan, seeking a declaration that he is entitled to recover his retirement benefits and gratuity from the respondents, and a direction for their immediate release. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner submitted that he was appointed in 1964 as coolly (BPS-02) in the Municipal Public Health Services, KMC, Karachi, and retired on 30.06.2024, but his retirement benefits and gratuity have not been paid. 3. Learned counsel for KMC stated that the petitioner’s pension papers were received on 18.06.2025, and the pension case was finalized and certain amount is payable within two weeks. The request of the learned counsel for the counsel for the KMC seems to be reasonable and acceded to. 4. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE M. Khan
